Fuel — Rage Pool
When you fail a Check, place those rolled dice in your Rage pool. When you take damage, place the damage dice from each hit into your Rage pool.
Frenzy — 5+ Dice
Immediately top-deck and play the top card of your deck — narrate how your rage shapes it. That Action gains Boost 3. Unplayable cards generate 1 Resolve. Rage pool fully clears.
Spend — Retribution
At any point, spend your entire pool for Retribution (see Card 2).

old:

Retribution
They shouldn't have touched them.

Spend your entire Rage pool. Roll all those dice. Keep the highest (Tier × 2) results and add them to your next Check targeting the source.
After Retribution
Rage pool resets to zero. Works in any Scene — Combat, social, exploration. The GM interprets what "targeting the source" means.
